Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: browser game 3D PBR texture source
Primary request: premium dark walnut tabletop texture for a luxury Tichu table rebuild

Subject: rich dark walnut wood grain with subtle satin finish and handcrafted luxury furniture character
Composition: seamless square texture, evenly lit, centered grain variation, no edges or framing
Style: photorealistic material source, premium tabletop product quality
Lighting: neutral studio lighting with no directional shadow

Materials/details: visible natural grain, fine pores, faint finish sheen, no scratches, no logos, no objects
Constraints: tileable seamless texture, no borders, no vignette, no text, no cards, no table shape, no scene objects, no watermark

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: concept art reference for 3D scene implementation
Primary request: full scene reference image for a premium alternate 3D Tichu table from the south player perspective
Scene/backdrop: luxury tabletop product shot in a softly lit room, camera slightly above the south player seat looking across the full table
Subject: dark walnut table body with raised rim, green felt inset, four physical card trays, readable south hand, hidden opponent hands with ornate card backs, center trick zone, deck and discard zone, subtle pass lanes, brass score plaques, tichu badges
Composition: entire table fits comfortably in frame with the south tray prominent but not cropped, no giant empty void, balanced premium product-shot framing
Style: realistic polished tabletop scene intended as implementation concept art
Lighting: warm cinematic key light with soft fill, believable tabletop reflections, soft shadows, subtle ambient occlusion
Color palette: dark walnut, emerald felt, brass accents, ivory cards, deep jade and gold details
Materials/details: physical card thickness, velvet-like felt, real tray geometry, elegant but functional scene, not a debug board
Constraints: no UI overlays, no DOM chrome, no text labels, no watermark, no people
